296 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
CHART 448
Here as Jupiter is in Gemini with
Mars in Aries and the Moon in Cancer, Dh. Mars Jupt.
the native will have both brothers and
sisters.
Moori
Saturn is in Leo and the Sun in
Capricorn. Saturn contacts Ketu in Sun I
Virgo, Venus in Scorpio and Mercury Mer. ·Sat.

in Capricorn, so the native will frrst

take up agriculture and then trade in Ven. Dt.
....
wines etc. This latter profession will
yield unexpected profits.
Another example:
Mars and Saturn in Cancer, Ketu in Libra, the Moon in Scorpio with
Venus in 7th (Taurus). This is a Female chart. The husband represented by
Mars is in debilitation. As Mars and the Moon have exchanged places, when
Mars comes to Scorpio he aspects Venus. This indicates sudden income.
Venus and the Moon are inimical. The exchange of places between the Moon
and Mars will give opportunities for gambling so the husband was given to
gambling but always he lost as Mars was in debilitation.
